## What & why

<!-- What changes, and what problem it solves. Link the issue if one exists. -->

## Safety check

- [ ] No path lets a model bypass validation → policy → preview → confirmation
- [ ] New/changed behaviour has deterministic tests (no model calls)
- [ ] Errors use typed codes; results stay JSON-safe

## Release

- [ ] Changeset added (`pnpm changeset`) — or no package behaviour changed
